column_border_width="none" column_border_style="solid" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column_text]

Suli Breaks – Motivational Speaker & Spoken Word Artist

Suli Breaks is one of the UK's most sought-after motivational speakers and spoken word artists, combining the power of poetry with the precision of a keynote speaker. Based in London and available worldwide, Suli delivers transformative experiences that move audiences intellectually, emotionally, and creatively. Whether you are planning a corporate conference, a university event, a school assembly, or a live festival, Suli crafts each performance and talk to resonate with your specific audience.

His viral spoken word piece "Why I Hate School But Love Education" has been watched by millions and sparked global conversations about learning, identity, and purpose. That same power — the ability to articulate what people feel but struggle to say — is what Suli brings to every stage he steps on.

Who Books Suli Breaks

Suli speaks for organisations that want their audiences to leave differently. He has been booked by FTSE 100 and global corporations including BT, Lloyds Banking Group, Microsoft, Meta, and Nike; by leading professional platforms such as LinkedIn, TED, and the BBC; by governments and institutions including the Houses of Parliament and the United Nations; by schools and universities across the UK and internationally; and by festivals and cultural events where live performance meets social commentary.

Speaking Topics

Suli speaks at the intersection of creativity, culture, and lived experience. His talks and performances explore:

  • Entrepreneurship & creative ambition — building something meaningful from the ground up
  • Identity & authenticity — understanding who you are and showing up fully in professional and personal life
  • Education & the future of learning — rethinking what it means to be intelligent and educated
  • Social change & representation — the importance of diverse voices in shaping culture
  • Resilience & purpose — navigating adversity and finding meaning in the journey
  • Creativity in the workplace — unlocking creative thinking in teams, organisations, and institutions

Why Organisations Book Suli

Suli does not deliver a standard keynote. His format — part spoken word performance, part storytelling, part sharp cultural insight — is designed to move people. Audiences leave with new perspectives, not just inspiration. He brings global reach with personal impact; his viral work has reached millions, and audiences consistently leave his live performances transformed. His authentic voice, shaped by lived experience, gives him a credibility and depth that few speakers can match. He is equally powerful in a 300-seat auditorium, a corporate boardroom, a school hall, or a virtual event, and he writes bespoke pieces for organisations — creating something that truly belongs to your event.

What Clients Say

"Suli's powerful, thought-provoking performance left a lasting impression. Through his unique blend of poetry and storytelling, he captivated the audience, sparking meaningful conversations around identity, resilience, and empowerment. The feedback from our colleagues has been overwhelmingly positive."

— BT Openreach

"Suli Breaks delivered a truly unforgettable keynote that reframed how we think about creativity in the workplace. With poetic precision and heartfelt clarity, he reminded us that creativity thrives on connection. His words resonated across every department, leaving our team inspired."

— LinkedIn

"Suli's performance was nothing short of electrifying. His words stirred hearts, sparked reflection, and set the tone for an evening rooted in pride, power, and purpose. He captured the spirit of the celebration with such authenticity and brilliance."

— Lloyds Banking Group

"Suli Breaks brought something truly unforgettable to Youth Music: Uncovered. His spoken word piece captured the heart and soul of the evening — blending humour, honesty, and deep emotional resonance in a way that connected with every person in the room. The room was completely captivated, and we received incredible feedback from our guests."

— Matt Griffiths, Chief Executive, Youth Music

Frequently Asked Questions

What does a Suli Breaks speaking engagement look like?

Every engagement is tailored. For corporate events, Suli typically delivers a 20–45 minute performance or keynote, blending spoken word with direct address and audience interaction. For schools and universities, sessions are shaped around specific themes — entrepreneurship, identity, or future careers. He also delivers bespoke commissioned pieces for brand campaigns and cultural events.

How long is a typical session?

Sessions range from 20 minutes for a keynote performance to full half-day workshops. The most common format is a 30–45 minute keynote followed by a Q&A. Suli is also available for panel discussions, hosting, and multi-session programmes.

Is Suli available for virtual events?

Yes. Suli Breaks has delivered powerful virtual keynotes and performances for global organisations. Virtual sessions retain the same energy and impact as his live appearances — he adapts his delivery format for the digital stage with the same care and craft he brings to every live event.

Does Suli perform internationally?

Yes. Suli is available for events across the UK, Europe, the United States, and beyond. He has spoken at events in multiple countries and is experienced at engaging international and cross-cultural audiences.

How do I book Suli Breaks for an event?

Use the Get in Touch form or visit the Book Me page to submit your enquiry. We respond within 48 hours with availability, fee details, and next steps.
